metaTitle: Travel trailer buying, selling and rental | Clinique du VR
metaDescription: Clinique du VR buys, sells and rents travel trailers in Gatineau, with delivery available in Outaouais, the Ottawa region, and up to 200 km away.

hero.title: Travel trailer buying, selling and rental
hero.body: Clinique du VR offers carefully inspected used RVs for sale, as well as travel trailer rentals based on your needs. Browse the available units, ask about rental options, and contact us to arrange delivery to the agreed site from Gatineau.

intro.title: Our available trailers and services
intro.body: We offer simple, clear support for RV buying, selling, and rental based on your needs.

cards.title: RV buying
cards.body: We buy used travel trailers that need repair, restoration, or modernization. For an evaluation, you need to send complete photos, the city, the known problems, and a photo of the information plate. We buy at low prices because we then invest in repairs, modernization, and resale or rental preparation. The trailer must be registered in Quebec, the chassis must not be cracked, and requests without information will not be processed.

cards.title: RV sales
cards.body: Our travel trailers for sale are carefully inspected, repaired when needed, and checked to ensure they are free from water intrusion. The goal is to offer a unit that is more reliable, more reassuring, and better prepared for the road.

cards.title: RV rental
cards.body: Whether it is for a weekend escape or a stay of several weeks, our travel trailers are ready to go. We can deliver and place the trailer directly at the chosen campground anywhere within a 200 km radius of Gatineau to offer a simpler, more practical, and hassle-free rental.

emptyState: No units are listed at the moment. Contact us directly to find out which travel trailers are available for purchase, sale, or rental.

contactCard.title: Questions about a trailer?
contactCard.body: Call us, email us, or book online to get more information about our travel trailers for purchase, sale, or rental. We can also arrange delivery to the agreed site.

items.title: Jayco JAY FLIGHT 225MLS 2024
items.summary: Used inventory / Jayco JAY FLIGHT 225MLS 2024 recreational vehicle.
description: Jayco Jay Flight SLX 2024 – Model 225MLS. Comfort, reliability and room for your adventures.

The Jayco Jay Flight SLX 225MLS 2024 is a versatile travel trailer designed to offer an excellent balance of residential comfort, build quality, and towing ease. Ideal for couples or small families, it stands out for its smart layout and warm atmosphere.
From the moment you step inside, the living area feels bright and functional. The seating is comfortable for relaxing after a day outdoors, and the large windows bring in plenty of natural light.
The central kitchen is fully equipped to meet all your camping needs: abundant storage, practical work surfaces, and modern appliances let you prepare meals with ease, just like at home.
The closed front bedroom offers real privacy, with a comfortable bed, well-integrated storage, and an atmosphere made for rest. It is an ideal space to recover after a day of exploration.
The bathroom is well laid out and practical, with a shower, toilet, and sink, giving you all the comfort you need whether for weekend getaways or longer stays.

Like all Jayco travel trailers, the Jay Flight SLX 225MLS benefits from robust construction, effective insulation, and durable materials designed for the road and the seasons. Its design also aims for simple, intuitive use, making it a good fit for both beginner and more experienced campers.

Why choose the Jay Flight SLX 225MLS 2024? Spacious and functional layout, modern and welcoming interior design, reliable and durable construction, ideal for couples or small families, and excellent value for its category.
